com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Interface POSLinkPrinter.RecommendWidth

  • Enclosing class:
    POSLinkPrinter

    public static interface POSLinkPrinter.RecommendWidth
    The recommend pixel width for your bitmap in different devices.
